subject: Computer Networking
title: Slack and Team Messaging
description: A quick, practical guide to Slack and Team Messaging.

hook.text: Slack replaced email for millions of teams. Channels, threads, and integrations keep work flowing.

buildup.text: Slack uses WebSocket connections for real-time delivery. Messages appear instantly across all clients.

discovery.text: Channels are topic-based rooms. Threads keep replies organized. Search indexes every message ever sent.

twist.text: Slack messages are not end-to-end encrypted. The company can access all content. IT admins can export it.

climax.text: Bots and integrations connect Slack to GitHub, Jira, and hundreds of tools via its API.

punchline.text: Slack organizes team chat into channels. Fast, searchable, open.

quiz.question: What technology gives Slack real-time message delivery?
